channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Tesla se fait écraser par BYD en Europe : les chiffres de ventes sont implacables, à un (gros) détail près
item.description: Le rapport de force s'inverse de façon spectaculaire sur le Vieux Continent. En février, le géant chinois BYD a de nouveau écoulé plus de véhicules que Tesla. Et si la firme d'Elon Musk tente de s'accrocher à l'illusion d'une légère croissance, les chiffres révèlent un décrochage particulièrement brutal pour l'Américain. Mais attention à bien lire entre les lignes et à tenir compte des moteurs hybrides. ...

item.title: Cox Communications not liable for pirated music, Supreme Court rules
item.description: The Supreme Court has issued its ruling in a lengthy copyright battle between Cox Communications and major record labels, determining that the cable and internet service provider isn't responsible for illegally downloaded music, as reported earlier by the Associated Press. The unanimous decision says Cox "neither induced its users' infringement nor provided a service tailored […]...

item.title: Everything to Remember About ‘The Handmaid’s Tale’ Ahead of ‘The Testaments’
item.description: The sequel series starring Chase Infiniti (‘One Battle After Another’) and Emmy winner Ann Dowd begins April 8 on Hulu.

item.title: I test TVs for a living and these 4 models are my picks if you're looking for a new TV for the World Cup
item.description: The World Cup is only a couple of months away, so there's no better time to upgrade your TV. I've picked four of the best models you can get right now, all for under $1,000.

item.title: Boulanger retire 500 € sur ce puissant PC portable gamer Lenovo sous RTX 5070
item.description: Le Lenovo LOQ 15IRX10 est un laptop gamer taillé pour la performance avec sa carte graphique puissante et son écran bien fluide. Aujourd'hui, Boulanger le propose à 1 299,99 euros au lieu de 1 799,99 euros grâce à un code promo.

item.title: Should Nintendo be worried? The maker of the best Switch accessory just announced the 'ultimate' Switch 2 controller
item.description: CRKD just unveiled the 'ultimate' Nintendo Switch 2 controller.

item.title: Amazon’s Spring Sale Is Blooming With Smart Bird Feeders
item.description: These Amazon Spring Sale picks actually deserve a spot in your yard.

item.title: My favorite gadget in the world just got a price cut — the reMarkable 2 bundle is a masterclass in focus for business professionals and writers
item.description: I love this handwriting tablet tailored for distraction-free productivity - and it's cheaper in the sales right now.

item.title: DeleteMe acquires social media security tool Block Party
item.description: Tracey Chou founded Block Party in 2018 as a tool to help people stay safe from targeted harassment on Twitter, inspired by her own experiences.

item.title: The Afeela 1 came too late and now is gone too soon
item.description: One of the most overly hyped, unfortunately named and curiously positioned cars has been officially killed. It's the Afeela 1, better known as the PlayStation Car, and it was meant to be an ultimate intersection of personal mobility and digital media. It is, instead, dead, killed by a combination of headwinds that even the most pessimistic of mobility analysts couldn't have foreseen when it was first revealed six years ago.That said, the six year interval might have been the biggest blow to the Afeela 1's chances.How did we get here?What was to become the Afeela 1 debuted at CES 2020 as the So...

item.title: Comme Apple, Sony renonce à son projet de voiture électrique (et on s’y attendait un peu)
item.description: L'entreprise Sony Honda Mobility vient d'annoncer l'annulation pure et simple de ses deux modèles électriques en développement. Cette décision radicale fait suite au récent revirement stratégique de Honda concernant ses propres véhicules électriques.

item.title: Seiko resurrected a 44-year-old digital watch NASA astronauts wore to space
item.description: The Omega Speedmaster Professional, worn by Buzz Aldrin during the Apollo 11 lunar landing, is the most recognized watch to go to space. But the Seiko Rotocall, featuring a unique design that made it easier to switch between the watch's various modes, could be a close second. Seiko has resurrected and rereleased the watch used […]

item.title: Google launches Lyria 3 Pro music generation model
item.description: Google is launching Lyria 3 Pro, an upgraded music model that generates longer, more customizable tracks, as it expands AI music tools across Gemini, enterprise products, and other services.

item.title: Russia arrests alleged owner of cybercrime forum LeakBase, report says
item.description: Russian state-owned media reported that police in Russia arrested the administrator of LeakBase, a large hacking forum.

item.title: Supreme Court rules ISPs aren't liable for subscribers' music piracy
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled unanimously on March 25 that Cox Communications is not liable for copyright infringement committed by its subscribers, reversing a 2024 appeals court decision that had upheld the ISP's liability. Sony Music Entertainment and other major labels sued Cox in 2018, arguing the company failed to terminate internet service for subscribers repeatedly flagged for pirating copyrighted music. A jury awarded $1 billion in statutory damages after finding Cox willfully infringed all 10,017 copyrighted works at issue, though this was overturned on appeal and a new trial was ordered. ...

item.title: Waymo relies on firefighters and police to bail out stuck robotaxis
item.description: In at least six instances identified by TechCrunch, first responders have had to take control of Waymo vehicles and move them out of traffic during emergency situations.

item.title: J’ai testé le MacBook Neo : le meilleur premier MacBook de beaucoup de gens ?
item.description: Avec le MacBook Neo, Apple propose enfin un ordinateur portable sous les 800 euros. Avec ses airs de MacBook Air et sa puce d'iPhone, il nous réserve bien des surprises. Mais en devient-il l'entrée de gamme ultime pour autant ? Voici notre test complet.

item.title: Trump Rewards Big Tech’s Biggest Bootlickers With Seats on AI Policy Board
item.description: The board mostly consisted of academics under Biden.

item.title: Who needs a DJI? This ultimate DIY drone hits 67mph and costs just $155
item.description: Max Imagination has shared the painstaking design and build process that went into creating his cheap, speedy FPV drone, and provides full instructions for anyone who wants to repeat his feat.

item.title: Razer’s New Blade 16 Gaming Laptop May Have Good Battery life, for Once
item.description: Razer's switching to Panther Lake and is trying to fix the worst pain points of the previous premium Blade.

item.title: Don’t buy your next Nintendo Switch 2 game until you use this easy trick to save $15
item.description: Don't buy any Nintendo Switch 2 games without first seeing this money saving trick.

item.title: Spotify is testing a tool to help real artists deal with AI slop on their profiles
item.description: Low-quality, mass-produced AI songs have been flooding music streaming platforms like Spotify for a couple of years now. This is annoying, but relatively easy for fans to avoid. However, it leads to real problems for artists. There's so much slop coming in that some gets falsely attributed to actual musicians on these platforms. This messes with brand identity and audience retention, but Spotify is testing a new tool to help real artists exercise more control over their profiles. The platform's Artist Profile Protection feature lets musicians review releases before they go live and become asso...

item.title: Reddit accounts with ‘fishy’ bot-like behavior will soon need to prove they’re human
item.description: Reddit is taking new steps to identify bots on the platform - a process that may require some users to confirm that they're human. In a post on Wednesday, Reddit CEO Steve Huffman writes that the company will introduce a labeling system for accounts registered as bots, and ask users with "automated" or "fishy behavior" […]

item.title: Reddit takes on the bots with new ‘human verification’ requirements for fishy behavior
item.description: Reddit will require suspected automated accounts to verify they’re human, as it ramps up efforts to curb bot-driven spam and manipulation.

item.title: I checked every deal and this is the best budget standing desk across the whole Amazon Big Spring Sale
item.description: As an office furniture reviewer, this FlexiSpot sit-stand desk is the top pick for me.

item.title: Reddit will prompt some accounts to 'verify humanness' in latest bot crackdown
item.description: Reddit CEO Steve Huffman has detailed the company's latest plan to fight bots and it means that some accounts will need to "verify humanness," though the company is stopping short of widespread identity verification. In an update, Huffman said that in "rare" cases accounts that seem "fishy" will be prompted for additional verification.Such prompts "will not apply to most users," according to Huffman, but will apply to accounts where Reddit detects signs of automated posting or bot-like behavior. If the account doesn't pass the verification test, it may be "restricted" from the platform. For no...

item.title: Sony Bravia Theatre : des barres de son, des caissons et même des enceintes arrière pour un home cinéma totalement immersif
item.description: Sony étoffe ses gammes de produits audio pour le Home Cinéma avec l’arrivée sur le marché de deux nouvelles barres de son, deux caissons de basses et un kit d’enceintes arrière, tous venant s’interfacer les uns avec les autres.

item.title: Sony renouvelle deux téléviseurs Bravia et fait le plein côté audio
item.description: Sony dévoile aujourd’hui ses nouveautés pour la maison et renouvelle sa gamme Bravia avec deux nouvelles versions de téléviseurs ainsi que de nouvelles barres de son et enceintes.

item.title: What ‘Chainsaw Man’ and ‘Evangelion’ Share in Their Endings
item.description: Tatsuki Fujimoto bringing the popular shonen series to a close rhymes in both themes and the split reaction from its fandoms.

item.title: The US Has Already Caused $10 Trillion in Climate Damages—and the Math Gets Worse
item.description: Individual climate actions have tangible monetary consequences, researchers say. But that goes both ways.

item.title: Sony's upcoming Bravia 3 II is a mid-range LED TV available in sizes up to 100 inches
item.description: Sony just revealed the upcoming Bravia 3 II mid-range LED TV. It'll be available in sizes all the way up to 100 inches, for those in need of a home theater centerpiece. It's considered a mid-range device, but is still outfitted with plenty of tech typically reserved for the company's high-end displays. First of all, these TVs ship with Sony's XR processor. This grants access to the company's proprietary Clear Image algorithm, auto HDR tone mapping and more. It's nice to see these features expand beyond flagship products. The 4K LED display supports Dolby Vision, Atmos and DTS:X, with refresh r...

item.title: Google Lyria 3 Pro makes longer AI songs
item.description: Google is expanding the capabilities of its Lyria 3 music-making AI, enabling it to create tracks up to three minutes long and from within multiple other Google Products. Until now, Lyria had been limited to 30-second clips. Lyria 3 Pro not only increases the maximum length sixfold, it also allows the user to prompt for […]

item.title: Sony adds the Bravia Theater Bar 5 and Bar 7 to its soundbar lineup
item.description: Sony already has a robust collection of soundbars in its Bravia Theater lineup. Today, the company is adding two more, as well as new rear speakers and three new subwoofers. The Bar 7 will sit in Sony’s premium tier, alongside the existing (and larger) Bar 8 and Bar 9 models, while the Bar 5 will offer a more compact and more affordable solution just below the current Bar 6.The Bravia Theater Bar 7 utilizes nine total drivers to produce Dolby Atmos, DTS:X and IMAX Enhanced sound. More specifically, that arrangement includes three woofers, two tweeters, two up-firing units and two side-firing d...

item.title: Bravia 3 II et Bravia 2 II : les nouvelles TV LCD d’entrée de gamme chez Sony
item.description: Sony vient enfin de dévoiler une partie de ses nouvelles gammes TV pour l’année 2026. On commence avec les deux séries Bravia 3 II et Bravia 2 II embarquant une dalle Direct LED voulant respecter « l’intention des créateurs ». En voici tous les détails.

item.title: Economy-Class Couch Seats Are Coming to United Airlines Flights
item.description: The United Relax Row will be available on some long-haul flights starting in 2027.

item.title: Ultrahuman Is Back: Can the Ring Pro Beat Oura in the US Market?
item.description: Ultrahuman is officially back in the US and looking to disrupt the status quo with its most advanced smart ring yet.

item.title: Meta pourrait licencier 15 800 employés, soit 20 % de ses effectifs
item.description: Meta préparerait un nouveau plan social d’ampleur. Le groupe envisage de supprimer jusqu’à 20% de ses effectifs, soit environ 15 800 postes, pour compenser ses investissements colossaux dans l'IA.

item.title: Why strong authentication beyond the browser will define the future of connected devices
item.description: Authentication standards need to extend beyond the browser to cover the full spectrum of connected devices, from vehicles to smart home infrastructure.

item.title: X is changing its revenue-sharing policy to deter users pretending to be Americans
item.description: X is updating its revenue-sharing incentives to give more weight to engagement from a user’s home region, Nikita Bier, the company’s Head of Product has announced. Bier said the change in policy was to “encourage content that resonates with people in [the user’s] country, in neighboring countries and people who speak [their] language.” Bier continued that while X appreciates everyone’s opinion on US politics, the company is hoping the new policy can “disincentivize gaming the attention of US or Japanese accounts.” The US and Japan have the largest number of users on X. Bier didn’t mention it ...

item.title: Privacy Isn’t the Only Thing Plaguing Meta’s Smart Glasses
item.description: A European rollout is also hitting blockades thanks to the smart glasses' battery and use of AI.

item.title: How soap opera-TikTok hybrids became a billion-dollar business
item.description: Over the past few years, a new category of mobile apps has quietly exploded into a multi-billion dollar business. They’re called “micro dramas” — short-form, mobile-first scripted shows designed to be watched vertically on your phone. Think soap opera meets TikTok, complete with secret billionaire romances, disapproving werewolf mothers-in-law, and cliffhangers engineered to keep users tapping. The leading […]...

item.title: Invincible season 4 episode 4 does something the Prime Video show has never done before — but fans are saying 'this is not it' for a wholly different reason
item.description: Invincible season 4 just introduced a storyline that isn't in the comics, but it has taken a backseat to another big fan discussion.

item.title: C’est pour 2028 : la Nasa annonce le « premier vaisseau nucléaire interplanétaire » vers Mars… avec des hélicoptères à bord
item.description: La Nasa a annoncé de grandes missions à venir, dont l'une se dirigera vers Mars dès 2028. Le changement : elle se fera à bord d'une fusée propulsée par un moteur nucléaire, plus puissant et plus rapide… en théorie.

item.title: Lancement européen des lunettes Display de Meta : pourquoi ça coince
item.description: Les Européens ne sont pas près de porter les lunettes Ray-Ban Display de Meta. Ce nouveau modèle équipé d'un écran devait être commercialisé en début d'année en France et en Italie, mais le géant des réseaux sociaux souffre d'un problème d'inventaire. Il se heurte aussi aux réglementations locales sur la batterie et l'IA.

item.title: LG casse le prix de ce pack vidéoprojecteur 4K avec barre de son, pour un vrai home cinéma
item.description: On sait que la partie audio est souvent le point noir des vidéoprojecteurs. Alors quand ce modèle 4K de chez LG se trouve dans un pack avec une barre de son à 799 euros au lieu de 1 018 euros, c'est une belle affaire pour les cinéphiles.

item.title: Sora never understood what makes social media work
item.description: Social media hinges on the pretense of reality. OpenAI’s AI platform didn’t. Ding-dong, Sora is dead! So says the executive team at OpenAI, which now wants its talented staff to say goodbye to the generative AI social media platform—which was only online for a few months—and invest most of its efforts on its core business: enterprise services and coding. In other words, OpenAI is back to focusing on its key goal (beating Anthropic), instead of what the company’s CEO of applications reportedly described as a “side quest” (trying to overtake TikTok). Disney, which was hoping to license its iconi...

item.title: 4 lessons from the mass timber movement
item.description: The success of this green building material offers insights any leader can use to drive true innovation. The climate crisis demands that we rethink how we construct the built environment. Buildings account for more than 33% of global energy consumption and nearly 40% of greenhouse gas emissions. Traditional building materials like concrete, steel, and glass are energy-intensive to produce, meaning truly sustainable buildings are difficult to achieve when we rely on the status quo....

item.title: Harvey confirms $11B valuation: Sequoia triples down
item.description: Investors like Sequoia, Andreessen Horowitz, Kleiner Perkins, Elad Gil can't get enough of AI legal tech startup Harvey.

item.title: Votre ordinateur ou smartphone peut-il faire tourner une IA ? Ce site vous donne la réponse en un clic
item.description: Un nouveau site Internet intègre un outil très simple mais ultra pratique : CanIRun.ai permet, en un clic, de savoir si votre appareil (smartphone, tablette ou PC) est capable de faire tourner une intelligence artificielle en local directement sur votre machine.

item.title: The rise of the cyber hacker - does clout matter more than cash?
item.description: Cybercriminals chase notoriety, reshaping threats as disruption eclipses profit in 2026, across industries worldwide increasingly.

item.title: iOS 26.4 is here with some handy upgrades for your iPhone — here are the 5 best new features
item.description: The iOS 26.4 update is now available. Here are 5 of the biggest new features it contains.

item.title: How to get early access to Alexa+ in the UK — here's what you need to know
item.description: Amazon's next-generation, AI-powered smart assistant has made it to the UK; here's what you need to sign up for early access.

item.title: Live-service games are such a mess even Fortnite is struggling
item.description: For years, major game publishers and developers have been chasing a particular north star: Fortnite. With its internet-shaking live events and copious celebrity cameos, Epic's battle royale shooter became the epitome of what a live-service game could be, one that reached a level of cultural ubiquity that few other entertainment products could match while also […]...

item.title: Débit doublé pour 1 € de plus : cette offre fibre de SFR à 22,99 € sort du lot [Sponso]
item.description: Sans engagement, cette offre RED box de SFR qui démarre à 22,99 € par mois permet de sélectionner soi-même le niveau de prestation pour coller au plus près à ses besoins et à son budget.

item.title: AI robot snaps together like Lego and moves unlike anything I've ever seen before — I can't stop watching
item.description: Researchers used AI to design an unusual-looking Lego-like AI robot that moves and survives unlike any robot you've seen before.

item.title: The 'best shipping label printer' we ever tested is only $76 in the Amazon Big Spring Sale — the Munbyn RW403B is quick, quiet, and actually fun to use
item.description: Our senior printer editor loves this Bluetooth thermal label printer for small businesses, retailers, entrepreneurs, and online sellers.

item.title: Millions possibly affected by data breach at dermatology giant QualDerm
item.description: QualDerm is notifying people about a data breach which exposed their personal and health information.

item.title: « Offrir le prix le plus bas du marché » : Lidl casse les prix de sa recharge électrique face à la flambée de l’essence
item.description: Le spécialiste de la grande distribution lance une vaste offensive commerciale pour attirer les conducteurs de véhicules électriques sur ses parkings. En réduisant le prix de ses recharges, l'enseigne promet de soulager le portefeuille des automobilistes, mais la concurrence reste rude.
